title.romaji: Sumikko Gurashi Movie: Tobidasu Ehon to Himitsu no Ko
title.english: Sumikkogurashi: Good to be in the corner
title.native: 映画 すみっコぐらし とびだす絵本とひみつのコ
synonyms: Sumikko Gurashi The Movie - The Pop-up Book and the Secret Child

synopsis:
Sumikko Gurashi debuted in 2012 as slightly negative characters who like to stay in the corner of a room. The characters include "Shirokuma," a polar bear who is sensitive to cold; "Penguin?" (with a question mark in its name), a penguin who is unsure if it is actually a penguin; "Tonkatsu," a piece of pork cutlet that was left uneaten; "Neko," a shy cat; and "Tokage," who hides his nature as one of the last dinosaurs.

The franchise has inspired toys, books, stationery material, video games--and now a feature film.

(Source: ANN)

title.romaji: Sumikko Gurashi Movie: Aoi Tsukiyo no Mahou no Ko
title.english: Sumikkogurashi: The Little Wizard in the Blue Moonlight
title.native: 映画 すみっコぐらし 青い月夜のまほうのコ
